title: Active Travel Fund tranche 2: stage 1 process evaluation
body: "The Department for Transport (DfT) awarded funding to local authorities to produce walking and cycling facilities via the Active Travel Fund (ATF), with tranche 1 funding allocated in 2020 and tranche 2 funding allocated in 2021.  This report explores local authority officers’ views, perceptions and experiences of how ATF-funded schemes have worked in their area, including:   scheme development consultation and engagement how scheme characteristics affect success network planning   The report is the first stage of the ATF process evaluation, which was conducted as part of a wider evaluation of the ATF. It provides a summary of the stage 1 findings from the process evaluation, with feedback from 28 funded authorities across England through 4 focus groups.  Related content   Active Travel Fund tranche 2: evaluation baseline Active Travel Fund tranche 2: stage 2 process evaluation Active Travel Fund tranche 2: government response and peer review   "
